name: Macaque Monkey
prompt:
Long-tailed macaque (Macaca fascicularis). Common throughout Vietnam's jungles, often seen near villages and camps.

Physical structure (simplified, ~0.5m body length):
- Body: small rounded torso, slightly hunched
  - Chest area, belly slightly rounded
- Head: round head with flat face
  - Muzzle: slight protruding snout
  - Eyes: forward-facing (two small spheres or indentations)
  - Ears: small rounded ears on sides
- Arms: two arms, thin, long relative to body
  - Hands: simplified block hands
  - Arms slightly bent at elbows
- Legs: two legs, bent in sitting/crouching pose
  - Feet: flat
- Tail: long thin tail, ~0.5m, curves upward then drapes
  - Use thin cylinder or series of connected parts
- Overall: small, agile-looking primate

Colors: Gray-brown fur (0x8a7d6a), lighter belly/face (0xb5a890), pink face skin (0xc8a090), dark eyes (0x222222)
Orientation: Sitting on ground, facing +Z
Scale: Real-world meters (~0.5m body, ~0.3m head height when sitting = ~0.4m total sitting)
animations:
Idle: subtle body sway, 2s cycle
Head look: head pivot rotates Y-axis +/-20 degrees, 3s cycle
